## Skill Concept

What UI board skill should be added?

## Target Use Cases

- SaaS dashboard
- Admin panel
- AI tool
- Internal tool
- Productivity app
- Other:

## Visual Direction

Describe the intended design language, theme behavior, and component coverage.

## Required Deliverables

- [ ] `README.md`
- [ ] `preview.html`
- [ ] CSS files
- [ ] Design tokens
- [ ] Tailwind preset
- [ ] Screenshots
- [ ] `codex-skill/` bundle
- [ ] Usage reference

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Preview works without a build step.
- [ ] Light and dark themes are covered, if applicable.
- [ ] Documentation includes install and prompt examples.
- [ ] Folder structure follows project conventions.

## Additional Context

Add references, sketches, or examples if relevant.
